ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CBS CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION FKA VIACOM INC., SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO CBS CORPORATION, A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION, FKA WESTINGHOUSE ELECTRIC CORPORATION

OBJECTION TO STIPULATION OF HEARING BY COMMISSIONER HEWLETT FILED BY DEFENDANT CBS CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION FKA VIACOM INC., SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO CBS CORPORATION, A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION, FKA WESTINGHOUSE ELECTRIC CORPORATION

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-30-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) WAS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL STATED THAT THE CASE IS AT ISSUE. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/26/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 6/16/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS STIPULATED TO. THE PARTIES FURTHER STIPULATED TO SHORTENED TIME REGARDING SUMMARY JUDGEMENT SET FORTH IN G.O. 140. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 4/28/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE, BY FAX, AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. PATHOLOGY TO BE PROVIDED TO BERRY & BERRY BY 4/28/06. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: JANET POND #5292 (206)
